originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&irq` is never used.

presenceCondition:
(and (= CONFIG_TWL4030_CORE true)
     (= CONFIG_IRQ_DOMAIN false)
     (= CONFIG_OF_IRQ false))
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_TWL4030_CORE () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_IRQ_DOMAIN () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_OF_IRQ () Bool
  false)
reasoning: PC is infeasible: TWL4030=T causes '#define CONFIG_IRQ_DOMAIN' at L4 in 6252547b8a7.c, yet PC requires IRQ_DOMAIN=F — direct contradiction. Configuration cannot exist. Classification: FALSE.
